Description: A simple mod that randomizes the rolelist (only visually). Hold shift while clicking a gamemode to view the actual list.

CheckboxSettings.Name: Randomize In-Game
CheckboxSettings.Description: Randomize roledecks while in-game too, will decrease amount of playability drastically... use with caution.

IntegerInputSettings.Name: # of roles in list
IntegerInputSettings.Description: How many roles to place in the randomized list. Values above 15 may cause problems.
